name: Albatross Golf Sim & Bar
about: Albatross Golf Sim & Bar is a Chattanooga-based venue featuring indoor golf simulator bays combined with a full-service sports bar and event space. The facility utilizes Trackman technology to offer over 400 virtual golf courses and practice capabilities, with a stated 1-foot margin of error for ball tracking. It operates under a mixed pricing model, offering hourly bay rentals for non-members and tiered membership options for frequent users. The venue is designed to accommodate golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to veterans, and positions itself as an all-inclusive hangout regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology with 1-foot accuracy for realistic ball flight
All-weather play on over 400 virtual courses from around the world
Flexible hours and options for both casual play and serious practice sessions
Comprehensive food and drink menu available without requiring golf play
Regular leagues and tournaments for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full scratch-made menu including hand-crafted burgers, gourmet hot dogs, famous wings, sandwiches, and finger foods. Kitchen opens at 11 AM. Food available without playing golf.
Full liquor bar with cocktails, wine, and cold draft beer. No BYOB policy mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar system with 1-foot accuracy for ball landing location. Measures full trajectory of every shot.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental golf clubs are available for $5. They have clubs for right and left-handed players, and kids clubs for ages 3-6.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, BYOB is not mentioned. The venue has a full kitchen and bar with scratch-made food and a variety of beers, cocktails, and non-alcoholic beverages available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Sessions have a 4-hour limit, which should be sufficient to play 18 holes on most courses.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer kids golf clubs for ages 3-6, Trackman games like Magic Pond for all ages, and have a family-friendly atmosphere as noted in their marketing.
